steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports that cuttlefish adjusted their strikes to match 3D images, indicating their vision works like that of horses and toads.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C correctly states that the sentence presents the results of the study.
The other three either describe differences, suggest future work, or explain past assumptions, none of which the sentence does.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
